gap_notes: Corrected the top-level website_url from the legacy stats.bitcast.network subdomain to the canonical www.bitcast.network marketing site; stats.bitcast.network remains tracked as a dashboard surface.
Added the main bitcast-network/bitcast source-repo surface, which was previously cited as a source_url by several surfaces but never itself tracked.

Diffed the bitcast-api.bitcast.network OpenAPI schema (165 paths) for undiscovered public GET endpoints -- added 3 new no-auth validator-facing routes (validator/briefs, validator/x-briefs, validator/pools); the rest require APIKeyHeader/HTTPBearer auth.

name: Bitcast
notes: First maintainer review for SN93. Fixed 10 missing probe blocks, added the main source-repo surface, corrected website_url to the canonical domain, and added 3 new surfaces from an OpenAPI diff.

surfaces.name: Bitcast source repository
surfaces.notes: Official SN93 miner/validator source repository -- verified live 2026-07-15. Previously cited as a source_url by several surfaces in this file but never itself tracked.

surfaces.name: Bitcast website
surfaces.notes: Official Bitcast website (page title "bitcast"), linked from the bitcast-network/bitcast README. Distinct from the stats subdomain set as the legacy website_url.

surfaces.name: Bitcast briefs / creator portal
surfaces.notes: Public Bitcast briefs / creator portal (active campaigns). The README's "active briefs" link (dashboard.bitcast.network) 301-redirects to this canonical creator.bitcast.network host. Distinct from the stats dashboard.

surfaces.name: Bitcast deploy repository
surfaces.notes: Bitcast validator deployment repo; its GitHub description and README state "bittensor subnet #93" / "netuid-93". In the team's bitcast-network org, distinct from the top-level bitcast repo.

surfaces.name: Bitcast X subnet-mechanism repository
surfaces.notes: Bitcast "X" subnet-mechanism repo; README states "Register a UID on subnet 93" and "Subnet ID: 93 (Bittensor mainnet)". In the team's bitcast-network org.

surfaces.name: Bitcast active briefs API
surfaces.notes: Public JSON feed of active SN93 content briefs (id_brief, brief_id, brief text, boost, format). Served from the creator portal host; curl-verified 200 application/json with no auth. Distinct from the HTML briefs dashboard at /briefs.

surfaces.name: Bitcast creator portal health
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /api/health on creator.bitcast.network returning portal liveness JSON (observed: {"status":"ok"}). Served on the same host as the existing briefs subnet-api surface.

surfaces.name: Bitcast API OpenAPI schema
surfaces.notes: Machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1 schema for the Bitcast API gateway (bitcast-api.bitcast.network). The spec and Swagger UI at /docs are publicly fetchable; most documented endpoints require API-key auth, but the schema itself is no-auth.

surfaces.name: Bitcast API readiness health
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /health/ready on bitcast-api.bitcast.network returning API readiness JSON (status, app_name, version, database connectivity). Documented in the subnet OpenAPI spec on the same host as the existing openapi surface. Distinct from the creator-portal /api/health endpoint on creator.bitcast.network.

surfaces.name: Bitcast API database health
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /health/database on bitcast-api.bitcast.network returning database connectivity and pool status JSON. Documented in the subnet OpenAPI spec on the same host as the existing openapi and /health/ready surfaces. Distinct from the /health and /health/ready endpoints and the creator-portal /api/health endpoint on creator.bitcast.network.

surfaces.name: Bitcast minimum compute requirements
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth YAML miner and validator minimum hardware specification published at the root of the official bitcast-network/bitcast repository as min_compute.yml. Documents baseline CPU and RAM requirements for SN93 YouTube-token miners and validators.

surfaces.name: Bitcast whitepaper
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth whitepaper (PDF) for SN93 Bitcast, served at www.bitcast.network/whitepaper.pdf on the official Bitcast website (the same operator as the registered stats.bitcast.network / creator.bitcast.network surfaces). A machine-readable document describing the subnet's design — content-attention incentive mechanism, miner/validator roles, and scoring. Distinct in URL and kind from the API/dashboard surfaces already registered.

surfaces.name: Bitcast API health
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET returning API health including database liveness check. Documented in the subnet's own OpenAPI schema.

surfaces.name: Bitcast validator briefs feed
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /api/v2/validator/briefs on bitcast-api.bitcast.network returning the YouTube content-brief list (id, brief text, requirements) validators score miner submissions against. Documented in the subnet OpenAPI schema with no declared security -- distinct from the v1 creator-portal briefs API and internally auth-gated v2 briefs routes.

surfaces.name: Bitcast validator X (Twitter) briefs feed
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /api/v2/validator/x-briefs on bitcast-api.bitcast.network returning the Twitter/X content-brief list (pool, tag, inclusion rules) validators score against. Documented in the subnet OpenAPI schema with no declared security.

surfaces.name: Bitcast validator pool configuration
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /api/v2/validator/pools on bitcast-api.bitcast.network returning the Twitter/X engagement-pool scoring configuration (keywords, seed accounts, interaction-weight thresholds) validators apply. Documented in the subnet OpenAPI schema with no declared security.

auth.scopes_note: Requires an API key in the X-API-Key header (a Bearer JWT via the Authorization header is also accepted). Contact the subnet operator to obtain a key.
auth.name: X-API-Key

surfaces.name: Bitcast Root
surfaces.notes: Auth-gated GET / on bitcast-api.bitcast.network from the Bitcast OpenAPI schema (sn-93-bitcast-network-openapi). auth_required:true, probe.enabled:false.
